title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
description: Developed a machine learning solution using K-Means clustering to analyze customer purchasing behavior and automatically segment customers into meaningful groups. The insights help businesses improve targeted marketing strategies, customer retention, and personalized recommendations.

title: Campus Quest
description: Built a comprehensive full-stack university management and online examination platform that enables colleges to conduct quizzes, manage students and faculty, evaluate performance, and generate result analytics through an intuitive dashboard.

title: Furniture Marketplace
description: Designed and developed a secure MERN-based e-commerce platform for buying and selling furniture with user authentication, product management, shopping cart, order workflow, and responsive modern UI for a seamless shopping experience.

title: Nek Kam Foundation
description: Created a donation and NGO management platform that allows organizations to manage fundraising campaigns, donor records, and community initiatives while providing a transparent and user-friendly donation experience.

title: Netflix Clone with AI Recommendations
description: Developed a Netflix-inspired movie streaming platform using the MERN stack integrated with a machine learning recommendation engine that delivers personalized movie suggestions based on user preferences and viewing history.

title: AI Book Recommendation System
description: Built an intelligent book recommendation platform that leverages machine learning algorithms to suggest personalized books based on user interests, reading patterns, and similarity analysis while providing an interactive frontend experience.

title: AI Virtual Assistant
description: Developed a full-stack AI-powered virtual assistant capable of understanding natural language, answering user queries, and integrating with AI/ML services. Designed with a scalable architecture to support future features such as RAG, LLM integration, and intelligent task automation.

title: Crop Disease Detection
description: Developed a ML-based model for crop disease detection using deep learning and image processing techniques. The model is trained on a large dataset of crop images and can detect diseases in crops with high accuracy.
